topics: Introduction to Complexity Theory - Basic concepts and motivations
and computational models. Complexity Classes P and NP - Definitions and examples of P and NP
NP-completeness and the Cook-Levin theorem. Reductions and Completeness - Polynomial-time reductions
PSPACE-completeness. Polynomial Hierarchy and Alternation - Definition of the polynomial hierarchy (PH
Complete problems for each level of PH
Relationship between PH and other classes
Interactive Proofs - Definition and examples of interactive proofs
Zero-knowledge proofs. Probabilistically Checkable Proofs (PCPs) - Introduction to PCPs
Circuit Complexity - Boolean circuits and circuit complexity
Complexity of specific functions. Quantum Complexity - Basics of quantum computation
